'''√l-z-r''' ('''lazara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cumshaw|cumshaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cumshaw|cumshaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| lazara
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lazarithi || lazariji || lazarishi || lazari
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || lazaruthuth || lazarujuj || lazarushush || lazar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || lazaruthu || lazaruju || lazarushu || lazaru
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || lazarufuth || lazarufuj || lazarufush || lazaruf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lazarethe || lazareje || lazareshe || lazare
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lazarothoth || lazarojoj || lazaroshosh || lazar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lazarotho || lazarojo || lazarosho || lazaro
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lazarofoth || lazarofoj || lazarofosh || lazarof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lazarïfïf || lazarïfïf || lazarïfïf || lazarïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf || lazarïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lazaræthæ || lazaræjæ || lazaræshæ || lazaræ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lazarathath || lazarajaj || lazarashash || lazar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lazaratha || lazaraja || lazarasha || lazara
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lazarafath || lazarafaj || lazarafash || lazaraf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || lazarasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || golazarasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokilazarasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || lazarnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || golazarnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokilazarnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || lazarshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || golazarnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokilazarshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || lazarroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || golazarnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokilazarroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || lazarmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || golazarnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokilazarmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || lazarsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || golazarnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokilazarsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || lazarngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || golazarnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokilazarngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || lazaryaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || golazarnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokilazaryaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || lazaryamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || golazarnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokilazaryamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || lazarnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || golazarnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokilazarnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || lazarnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || golazarnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilazarnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || lazarnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || golazarnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokilazarnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || lazarshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || golazarnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokilazarshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || lazarshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || golazarnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilazarshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || lazarshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || golazarnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokilazarshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || lazarronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || golazarnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokilazarronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || lazarroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || golazarnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokilazarroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || lazarromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || golazarnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokilazarromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || lazarmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || golazarnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokilazarmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || lazarmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || golazarnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokilazarmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || lazarmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || golazarnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilazarmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || lazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || læzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || holazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || holæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hoholazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hoholæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nülazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nülæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünülazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünülæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïlazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïlæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lulazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lulæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lululazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lululæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lilazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lilæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lililazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lililæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kolazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kolæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokolazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokolæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kelazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kelæzær
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekelazar
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekelæzær
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
